ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the clothing type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Alpha, Numeric) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alpha_sizes" (
  "alpha_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Alpha size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the Alpha size belongs to */,
  "alpha_size_label" TEXT /* Label of the Alpha size (e.g., XS, S) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Alpha size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alpha_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alpha_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numeric_sizes" (
  "numeric_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Numeric size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the Numeric size belongs to */,
  "numeric_size_label" INTEGER /* Label of the Numeric size (e.g., 0, 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Numeric size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("numeric_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numeric_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Bust, Natural Waist) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the size range belongs to */,
  "alpha_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Alpha size the size range belongs to */,
  "numeric_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Numeric size the size range belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the size range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the size range */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_alpha_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("alpha_size_id") REFERENCES alpha_sizes ("alpha_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_numeric_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("numeric_size_id") REFERENCES numeric_sizes ("numeric_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the clothing item belongs to */,
  "alpha_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Alpha size the clothing item belongs to */,
  "numeric_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Numeric size the clothing item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_alpha_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("alpha_size_id") REFERENCES alpha_sizes ("alpha_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_numeric_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("numeric_size_id") REFERENCES numeric_sizes ("numeric_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "measurement_preferences" TEXT /* Customer's preferred measurements */,
  "size_preferences" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size labels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the clothing item (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the review (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the wishlist */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item on the wishlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, support) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create, read, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the ticket */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was submitted */,
  "ticket_text" TEXT /* Text of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the reply belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES customer_support ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the feedback belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was made */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the feedback (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_feedback_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the recommendation */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands_size_charts" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id", "size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands_clothing_types" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id", "clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands_clothing_items" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id", "clothing_item_id")
)
